description: D'Arcy & Kiel 2023 Table S5: node annotation for the expanded 451/452-node STRING network -- SysGO process/location, disease-gene flag + phenotype class, A375/FM55 mass-spec presence. One duplicate STRING-ID row (IKBKB, both identical) preserved verbatim from source.
